description: Live prod-to-plate contact broken under current: steel plate, handheld copper prod with insulated grip and cable off-frame, meter pegged at CURRENT ON / 800 A. Gap dimension draws as the tip lifts, jagged arc with flash halo bridges the gap (ping at root), hand-on-grip silhouette with burn ticks, leftover arc-strike crater with radiating micro-cracks, then red REJECT tag + condemn X over the part edge.
